headline: PROVE YOUR COLD CHAIN HOLDS
subheading: A practical UK guide to GDP transport validation, cold-chain qualification and inspection-ready data integrity.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial illustration evoking pharmaceutical cold-chain transport validation: a sleek insulated shipping container rendered as luminous translucent glass cross-section, revealing softly glowing rows of vials cradled in conditioned cooling panels, surrounded by a flowing temperature-curve ribbon that stays steady within an upper and lower limit band, faint route lines arcing across a dark map-like field with subtle handover waypoints. Deep navy background, teal and cyan light gradients tracing the stable thermal line, a single subtle green accent glow marking an in-range data point. Frosted brushed-metal surfaces, delicate condensation mist, shallow depth of field with soft bokeh, clinical-luxury premium mood, calm precise and trustworthy, generous negative space in the upper area. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
